nodes.name: Webhook — Receive Purchase
nodes.notes:
Register this URL in Gumroad: https://n8n.curcible.com/webhook/curcible-purchase
Also set as the Netlify PURCHASE_WEBHOOK in gumroad-webhook.mjs

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.product_name }} — your workflow is ready
parameters.message:
=
Curcible.

Purchase confirmed

{{ $json.product_name }} is yours, {{ $json.first_name }}.

{{ $json.product_tagline }}. Setup takes {{ $json.setup_time }}.

Workflow fileDownload {{ $json.product_file }}
License key{{ $json.license_key }}
Setup guide{{ $json.product_docs }}

How to install

  1. Download the workflow .json file above
  2. In n8n: Workflows → Import from file
  3. Add your credentials in each node that requires them
  4. Activate the workflow
  5. Follow the setup guide for credential-specific steps

Questions? Reply to this email — we respond within one business day.

Curcible  ·  support@curcible.com

WHERE_TO_REGISTER: Gumroad: each product → Edit → Advanced → Webhook URL → https://n8n.curcible.com/webhook/curcible-purchase
All 8 products use the SAME webhook URL — the permalink field routes them internally
PLACEHOLDERS_TO_REPLACE: {{CURCIBLE_GOOGLE_CRED_ID}} — n8n credential ID for Curcible Google OAuth2
{{CURCIBLE_GMAIL_CRED_ID}} — n8n credential ID for Curcible Gmail (support@curcible.com)
{{CURCIBLE_SLACK_SALES_CHANNEL}} — Slack channel ID (e.g. C0XXXXXXX) for sale notifications

ENV_VAR.DOWNLOAD_BASE_URL: Base URL where your workflow .json files are hosted (e.g. https://curcible.com/downloads). Upload the P0X-*.json files to Cloudflare R2, Netlify /public, or any stable CDN.

_SETUP_GUIDE.SLACK_OPTIONAL: Delete the Slack node and its connection if you don't want sale notifications.
